Platform — Reporting & Visibility

Finance-grade reporting. Not another Excel export.

Real-time spend visibility across every booking, approval, exception, and policy outcome — structured for finance teams, compliance review, and client reporting. Available immediately. Not at month end.

The problem

Travel reporting is still manual work

Someone in the team spends two days every month pulling booking data from a GDS export, cross-referencing it against an approval log in a spreadsheet, and producing a report that's already out of date by the time it reaches finance.

The data exists. The problem is that it's fragmented across booking tools, approval email threads, and expense systems — with no single source of truth.

What Cinturon360 delivers

Booking, approval, and policy outcome data is captured in a single data model — so reporting doesn't require aggregation. Spend is visible in real time, segmented however the viewer needs it, and exportable in structured formats for finance, audit, or client review.

Real-time spend visibility — not month-end summaries
Breakdown by traveller, department, cost centre, segment
Policy compliance rate and exception analysis
Approval turnaround time and escalation metrics
Supplier and route spend analysis
Multi-entity consolidation for complex programs
Export-ready: structured data, not raw dumps
Client-facing reporting for TMC account management

For finance teams

CFO-ready spend data with cost centre allocation, budget tracking, and variance analysis. Travel spend is treated like any other managed cost — structured, attributed, and reviewable without manual assembly.

For TMC account managers

Client-facing reporting without the monthly export ritual. Account managers can pull current spend, compliance, and exception data at any time — making client reviews a conversation, not a presentation of last month's news.

For audit and compliance

Every booking decision, approval, and exception is recorded with context. Compliance reports are generated from the same data that drives operations — no reconstruction, no interpretation.

Visibility that doesn't require a spreadsheet.

Talk to the team about what finance-grade reporting looks like for your travel program.
